allow: Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:9000/store/collections" 2>/dev/null | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(json.dumps\({'id':c.get\('id'\),'title':c.get\('title'\),'handle':c.get\('handle'\),'banner':c.get\('banner'\),'banner_image_url':c.get\('banner_image_url'\)},indent=2\)\) for c in d.get\('collections',[]\)]" 2>/dev/null || echo "FAILED")
